verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Many years ago a woman named Mary received a visit from an angel of the Lord she said be it unto me according to thy word, she said the right thing and the promise was given to her

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just say the right word what you asked will be given just approach Him with the right attitude. Hatty Right said, “that's the truth Brother Branham” she said the right word, her sons received eternal life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Around 900 denominations claim, they are His bride they all say that He's coming back for them but the showdown is gonna tell who belongs to Him, she'll say the right word, the rapture will take her away from here.
